text.title: GCP Security and IAM Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply `GCP Security and IAM` end-to-end. Each step has an input, an action, an output, and (where relevant) a decision gate.

step.name: scope-check
step.input: Trigger event + Applies-If / Skip-If from AGENTS.md.
step.action: Confirm all Applies-If hold and no Skip-If trigger fires; document GO/NO-GO.
step.decision-gate: If NO-GO, STOP and route to another methodology.

step.name: inventory-identities
step.action: List every principal + role; classify as human / service / external.

step.name: design-wif
step.input: CI providers list + workload identity needs.
step.action: Define WIF pool, OIDC providers, attribute mappings, SA-impersonation bindings.
step.decision-gate: If any SA still has a JSON key, REJECT and rewrite.

step.name: vpcsc-perimeter
step.action: Define perimeter with restricted services + ingress rules; dry-run before enforce.

step.name: cmek-and-audit
step.action: Create CMEK keys with rotation ≤ 90d; route audit logs to cross-project sink.

step.name: validate-and-commit
step.action: Run validator; fix VIOLATIONs; commit to Terraform repo; tag release.
step.decision-gate: If exit non-zero, return to draft.
